polygon.style: stroke-width: 0.00; stroke: none; stroke-linecap: butt; fill: #999999; fill-opacity: 0.40;

g.text: Total duration of war (in days, logarithmic scale)
Comparison to wars from 1823 to 2003. The median war that lasts 74 days goes on to last 261 days.
Expectations of duration of Iran war, based on modern inter-state wars' duration
Source: Correlates of War, Inter-State War Data; analysis by freerangestats.info
